title: pancheria ferruginea
intro: Pancheria ferruginea, also known as the rusty pancheria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. It is a small tree native to New Caledonia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparation of Pancheria ferruginea is typically made into a tincture or tea, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from coughs and colds to skin conditions and wounds.
